patch.value: GH-612: additive --add-ac/--remove-ac forms for acceptance criteria — replace-only --ac clobbers concurrent branch edits

pm update gains --add-ac and --remove-ac operating on individual criteria (tag-API parity) while --ac keeps replace semantics; additive form merges cleanly across branches for disjoint additions; full new-flag checklist (contracts, MCP, completions, docs) done; regression test covers cross-call additivity

GH-612. --acceptance-criteria/--ac replaces the whole value; repeatable only within one invocation (joins with '; ' per pm-b84u). Across calls/branches, two agents each adding a criterion clobber the base and conflict on the single acceptance_criteria line. Fix: --add-ac/--remove-ac individual-criterion operations (tag-API parity), replace semantics unchanged for --ac; disjoint additions merge cleanly across branches (pm-m3nl scalar-line caveat applies).
